messages.content: Hello there, I’m MindSpace. How are you feeling today? Are you doing okay?

To support your wellness journey, I’d like to capture and securely store audio, video, and text data during our sessions. This helps me personalise your experience, track your progress, and ensure a safe space for you. Please rest assured, your information is completely private and will never be shared without your permission. Do you feel comfortable consenting to this?
only with the voice i have give you permission
Thank you so much for your trust and consent. Your privacy and data security are my top priorities, so you can feel completely safe. I'm ready whenever you are to begin your wellness session!
